Key country IDs: 219=USA, 218=UK, 79=Germany, 74=France, 102=Italy, 196=Sweden, 197=Switzerland. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Price.Exchange)

columns.name: DbLoginName
columns.comment: Computed: SQL Server login of last row modifier. Auto-set on every DML. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Price.Exchange)

columns.name: AppLoginName
columns.comment: Computed: application identity from context_info(). Populated when the calling service sets context_info before DML. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Price.Exchange)

columns.name: SysStartTime
columns.comment: Temporal row validity start. Auto-managed by SQL Server system versioning. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Price.Exchange)

columns.name: SysEndTime
columns.comment: Temporal row validity end. Historical versions in History.Exchange. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Price.Exchange)

columns.name: Ric
columns.comment: Reuters/Refinitiv exchange suffix appended to RIC tickers (e.g., AAPL.N where N = NYSE). NULL for exchanges not available on Reuters/Refinitiv or where RIC routing is not used. Used by GetTickerInfo to build complete Reuters ticker strings for liquidity provider feeds. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Price.Exchange)

columns.name: LiquidityAccountID
columns.comment: Liquidity account identifier. Part of the composite PK (primary sort key). FK to Trade.LiquidityAccounts. Represents a price feed connection (e.g., a specific Bloomberg feed, FIX session, or internal price source). Clustered PK sorts by account first, enabling fast "all instruments for this account" lookups. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Price.LiquidityAccountToInstrument)

columns.name: InstrumentID
columns.comment: eToro instrument identifier. Part of the composite PK. FK to Trade.Instrument. NC index on InstrumentID alone enables fast reverse lookup: "all eligible accounts for this instrument." (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Price.LiquidityAccountToInstrument)

columns.name: DbLoginName
columns.comment: Computed: SQL Server login of last row modifier. Auto-set by SQL Server on every DML. Used for DB-level audit tracking. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Price.LiquidityAccountToInstrument)

columns.name: AppLoginName
columns.comment: Computed: application identity from context_info(). Populated when the calling service sets context_info before DML. NULL when not set. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Price.LiquidityAccountToInstrument)

columns.name: SysStartTime
columns.comment: Temporal row validity start. Auto-managed by SQL Server system versioning. Enables point-in-time configuration queries. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Price.LiquidityAccountToInstrument)

columns.name: SysEndTime
columns.comment: Temporal row validity end. Historical versions in History.LiquidityAccountToInstrument. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Price.LiquidityAccountToInstrument)

columns.name: HostName
columns.comment: Computed: DB server hostname that processed the last DML on this row. Unusual column - captures the server host rather than user. Relevant in distributed/replicated environments to trace which server wrote a given mapping. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Price.LiquidityAccountToInstrument)

columns.name: AdminPositionID
columns.comment: Auto-generated surrogate key. IDENTITY seed 3747184 indicates this table was re-seeded after data migration from AdminPositionLogOLD. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Trade.AdminPositionLog)

columns.name: AdminPositionRequestID
columns.comment: Correlation GUID grouping multiple admin position entries from the same batch request. Used for deduplication (CID + RequestID prevents duplicate execution) and for lookups via GetAdminPositionLogByRequestID. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Trade.AdminPositionLog)

columns.name: CID
columns.comment: Customer ID (internal platform identifier). Foreign key to Dim_Customer.

columns.name: InstrumentID
columns.comment: Instrument identifier. Foreign key to Dim_Instrument.

columns.name: AdminPositionEventID
columns.comment: Event correlation ID for the position creation event in the distributed system. Indexed for event-based lookups. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Trade.AdminPositionLog)

columns.name: HedgeServerID
columns.comment: Hedge server identifier. Indicates which internal liquidity/execution server handled the trade.

columns.name: RequestOccurred
columns.comment: The exact date and time when the customer clicked to request opening a position.

columns.name: UserName
columns.comment: eToro platform username chosen at registration. Unique, publicly visible display name.

columns.name: PositionID
columns.comment: Unique identifier for an open or closed trading position. FK to Dim_Position/Fact_Position.

columns.name: ValidatePositionWorth
columns.comment: Whether to validate minimum position value before opening. 0=Skip validation, 1=Enforce minimum worth check. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Trade.AdminPositionLog)

columns.name: CountryID
columns.comment: Country for which this restriction applies. References Dictionary.Country. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Trade.CopyTradeSettlementRestrictions)

columns.name: RegulationID
columns.comment: Regulation scope; NULL = all regulations for that country. References Dictionary.Regulation. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Trade.CopyTradeSettlementRestrictions)

columns.name: InstrumentTypeID
columns.comment: Instrument type (e.g., Crypto=5). References Dictionary.CurrencyType. Part of CK: at least one of InstrumentTypeID/ExchangeID/InstrumentID/GroupID required. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Trade.CopyTradeSettlementRestrictions)

columns.name: ExchangeID
columns.comment: Exchange scope; NULL = not exchange-specific. References Dictionary.ExchangeInfo. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Trade.CopyTradeSettlementRestrictions)

columns.name: InstrumentID
columns.comment: Specific instrument; NULL = not instrument-specific. References Trade.InstrumentMetaData. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Trade.CopyTradeSettlementRestrictions)

columns.name: RestrictionTypeID
columns.comment: Type of restriction (block/allow). References Dictionary.RestrictionType. Validated on INSERT. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Trade.CopyTradeSettlementRestrictions)

columns.name: ID
columns.comment: Surrogate primary key. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Trade.CopyTradeSettlementRestrictions)

columns.name: DbLoginName
columns.comment: Computed: current SQL login. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Trade.CopyTradeSettlementRestrictions)

columns.name: AppLoginName
columns.comment: Computed: application login from CONTEXT_INFO. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Trade.CopyTradeSettlementRestrictions)

columns.name: SysStartTime
columns.comment: System-versioning row start. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Trade.CopyTradeSettlementRestrictions)

columns.name: SysEndTime
columns.comment: System-versioning row end. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Trade.CopyTradeSettlementRestrictions)

columns.name: UnblockReasonId
columns.comment: If set, restriction can be overridden by this reason. References Dictionary.BlockUnBlockReason. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Trade.CopyTradeSettlementRestrictions)

columns.name: GroupID
columns.comment: Instrument group scope. References Dictionary.TradingInstrumentGroups. Part of CK. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Trade.CopyTradeSettlementRestrictions)

columns.name: RegistrationDate
columns.comment: Optional registration date for time-bounded rules. Part of UQ. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Trade.CopyTradeSettlementRestrictions)

columns.name: AccountTypeID
columns.comment: Account type scope. Part of UQ. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Trade.CopyTradeSettlementRestrictions)

columns.name: FundID
columns.comment: Primary key. Surrogate identifier for the fund. Referenced by Trade.FundInterval, Trade.FundIntervalAllocation, and fee/backtest procedures. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Trade.Fund)

columns.name: FundName
columns.comment: Display name of the fund. Set from Customer.CustomerStatic.UserName when Job_GenerateFundAllocation creates a fund. Shown in fund details and API responses. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Trade.Fund)

columns.name: FundAccountID
columns.comment: FK to Customer.CustomerStatic.CID. The customer account that holds the fund's positions. Used to check "is CID a fund?" (Confluence DCS-627). Join key for GetFundMetaData, GetFundCidsBulk. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Trade.Fund)

columns.name: FundOwnerID
columns.comment: FK to Customer.CustomerStatic.CID. The entity that owns/manages the fund. Job_GenerateFundAllocation looks up FundID by FundOwnerID; when null, creates new fund. Typically equals FundAccountID at creation. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Trade.Fund)

columns.name: IsPublic
columns.comment: 1 = fund is publicly discoverable; 0 = private. Returned by GetFundMetaData. Controls visibility in fund listing and copy flows. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Trade.Fund)

columns.name: MinCopyAmount
columns.comment: Minimum investment amount (in account currency) required to copy into this fund. Job_GenerateFundAllocation uses 5000 for new funds; sample data shows 100-5000. Enforced by application. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Trade.Fund)

columns.name: RefreshIntervalMonths
columns.comment: Rebalance interval in months. Job_GenerateFundAllocation uses this to compute Trade.FundInterval.PlannedEnd: adds this many months to PlannedStart. Sample: 1=monthly, 2=bimonthly, 3=quarterly. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Trade.Fund)

columns.name: CreateDate
columns.comment: When the fund row was created. Set by default. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Trade.Fund)

columns.name: LastUpdateDate
columns.comment: Last modification timestamp. Updated by application or procedures when fund config changes. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Trade.Fund)

columns.name: FundType
columns.comment: FK to Dictionary.FundType.FundTypeID. 1=TopTraders (copy-based), 2=Partners (external strategist), 3=Market (thematic index). NULL for older funds. See Dictionary.FundType. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Trade.Fund)

columns.name: HasCrypto
columns.comment: 1 = fund may hold crypto instruments; 0 = fund excludes crypto. Default 1. Returned by GetFundMetaData. Used for instrument filtering and risk rules. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Trade.Fund)

columns.name: LiquidityProviderID
columns.comment: PK from Trade.LiquidityProviders. Unique identifier for provider instance. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Trade.GetLiquidityProviders)

columns.name: LiquidityProviderName
columns.comment: Instance name (e.g., FXCM Real, FD RealStream Production REAL 208.100.16.161). From TLP. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Trade.GetLiquidityProviders)

columns.name: LiquidityProviderSettingsXML
columns.comment: Instance-specific XML settings. Can override type-level TypeSettingsXML. From TLP. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Trade.GetLiquidityProviders)

columns.name: LiquidityProviderTypeID
columns.comment: FK to Trade.LiquidityProviderType. Provider type: 0=eToro, 1=BMFN, 2=FXCM, 3=FD. From TLP. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Trade.GetLiquidityProviders)

columns.name: Name
columns.comment: Provider type name (e.g., FXCM, BMFN) from Trade.LiquidityProviderType. From TLPT. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Trade.GetLiquidityProviders)

columns.name: TypeSettingsXML
columns.comment: Type-level pluggable configuration: assembly/class for price, PCS, execution, hedging. From TLPT. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Trade.GetLiquidityProviders)

columns.name: InstrumentID
columns.comment: PK of Trade.Instrument. Same as InstrumentMetaData.InstrumentID. Identifies the tradeable instrument. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Trade.InstrumentCusip)

columns.name: CUSIP
columns.comment: Alias for InstrumentMetaData.Cusip. Committee on Uniform Securities Identification Procedures code for US/Canada securities. NULL for forex, crypto, many non-US instruments. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, etoro.Trade.InstrumentCusip)

columns.name: ISINCode

columns.name: CID
columns.comment: Customer identifier. Part of composite PK. References the customer who opened a first trading position. One row per CID (guaranteed by anti-join insert logic in SetTraderFirstAssetPosition). Used with PartitionCol for partition-aligned lookups: WHERE CID = @CID AND PartitionCol = @CID % 50. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.AffiliateConfiguration.TraderFirstAssetPosition)

columns.name: PartitionCol
columns.comment: Computed: CID % 50. PERSISTED. Part of composite PK. Partition alignment column for the PS_Mod50 scheme, distributing rows across 50 physical partitions. Always included in WHERE clauses alongside CID to enable partition elimination. Never set by application code - derived automatically from CID. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.AffiliateConfiguration.TraderFirstAssetPosition)

columns.name: FirstPositionAssetTypeID
columns.comment: Asset class of the customer's first trading position. Implicit FK to Dictionary.PositionAssetType: 0=All, 1=Forex, 2=Commodity, 3=CFD, 4=Indices, 5=Stocks, 6=ETF, 7=Bonds, 8=TrustFunds, 9=Options, 10=Crypto, 11=Copy. See Position Asset Type. Crypto (10) dominates at 61%, CFD (3) at 34%. Set once on INSERT and never updated. Matched against FirstPositionAssetPlan.PositionAssetTypeID to determine CPA amount. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.AffiliateConfiguration.TraderFirstAssetPosition)

columns.name: TotalRevenue
columns.comment: Cumulative trading revenue generated by this customer since their first position. Updated by SetCustomerFinanceDetailsState as new revenue is reported. NULL = no revenue reported yet. Used in RevenuesPercentage calculation to determine CPA threshold progress. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.AffiliateConfiguration.TraderFirstAssetPosition)

columns.name: MinimumCommission
columns.comment: CPA revenue threshold this customer must reach before the affiliate's commission is paid. Copied from the applicable FirstPositionAssetPlan entry. NULL = threshold not yet determined. 0 = no threshold required (immediate CPA payout). Updated by SetCustomerFinanceDetailsState alongside TotalRevenue. 98.6% of rows have 0 or NULL (no threshold). (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.AffiliateConfiguration.TraderFirstAssetPosition)

columns.name: DateAdded
columns.comment: Timestamp when the customer opened their first position and this row was created (UTC). Set by the @DateAdded parameter in SetTraderFirstAssetPosition - represents the actual position open time, not the insert time. Used in GetCreditTriggeredEvents for commission eligibility timing calculations. Never updated after insert. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.AffiliateConfiguration.TraderFirstAssetPosition)

columns.name: RevenuesPercentage
columns.comment: Computed (not persisted): progress toward CPA minimum commission threshold, rounded to 2 decimals. Formula: CASE WHEN MinimumCommission=0 THEN 100 WHEN MinimumCommission IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN MinimumCommission < TotalRevenue THEN 100 ELSE (TotalRevenue/MinimumCommission)*100 END. Returns 100 when threshold is met or no threshold exists. Used by reporting (PortalReportSummaryByAffiliate) to show conversion progress. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.AffiliateConfiguration.TraderFirstAssetPosition)

columns.name: DateUpdated
columns.comment: Timestamp of the last revenue update (UTC). Default: GETUTCDATE(). Set to GETUTCDATE() on every SetCustomerFinanceDetailsState call. columns.name: LoginName

columns.name: LoginPassword

columns.name: Phrase
columns.comment: Security phrase for account recovery or verification. Legacy field from original affiliate system. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.dbo.tblaff_Affiliates)

columns.name: Contact

columns.name: Email
columns.comment: Affiliate's email address. Has dedicated NC index. Used for notifications, password resets, and communication. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.dbo.tblaff_Affiliates)

columns.name: TaxID
columns.comment: Tax identification number for the affiliate. Required for payment processing and regulatory reporting in some jurisdictions. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.dbo.tblaff_Affiliates)

columns.name: SocialSecurity

columns.name: CompanyName

columns.name: CompanyAddress

columns.name: Country

columns.name: City
columns.comment: City of the affiliate's business address. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.dbo.tblaff_Affiliates)

columns.name: State

columns.name: Zip

columns.name: Telephone
columns.comment: Primary telephone number. Legacy field - PhoneCountryID + PhoneNumber are the structured replacement. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.dbo.tblaff_Affiliates)

columns.name: Fax
columns.comment: Fax number. Legacy communication field. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.dbo.tblaff_Affiliates)

columns.name: WebSiteURL
columns.comment: URL of the affiliate's website. Used for compliance review and traffic source verification. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.dbo.tblaff_Affiliates)

columns.name: WebSiteTitle
columns.comment: Title/name of the affiliate's website. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.dbo.tblaff_Affiliates)

columns.name: Comments
columns.comment: Free-text notes about the affiliate. Used by admins for internal annotations. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.dbo.tblaff_Affiliates)

columns.name: AccountStatus
columns.comment: Affiliate account lifecycle state: 0=Inactive/Pending (default), 1=Active, 2=Suspended, 4=Under Review, 5=Rejected. Controls portal access and commission eligibility. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.dbo.tblaff_Affiliates)

columns.name: SendEmailNotification
columns.comment: Controls whether the affiliate receives automated email notifications (commission reports, announcements). 1=receive emails, 0=no emails. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.dbo.tblaff_Affiliates)

columns.name: DateCreated
columns.comment: Timestamp of affiliate account creation. Set automatically on INSERT. Oldest records date to 2007-07-01. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.dbo.tblaff_Affiliates)

columns.name: AcceptedAgreement
columns.comment: Whether the affiliate has accepted the affiliate program terms and conditions. 1=accepted, 0=not yet accepted. Required before commissions can be paid. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.dbo.tblaff_Affiliates)

columns.name: AffiliateTypeID
columns.comment: Commission plan type. References dbo.tblaff_AffiliateTypes.AffiliateTypeID [done]. Determines commission rates, CPA slabs, and payment terms. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.dbo.tblaff_Affiliates)

columns.name: VATNumber
columns.comment: EU VAT registration number. Required for European affiliates for proper invoicing and tax compliance. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.dbo.tblaff_Affiliates)

columns.name: AffiliateCustom1
columns.comment: Custom field 1. Configurable per deployment for additional affiliate metadata. Sometimes used for last name or additional contact info. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.dbo.tblaff_Affiliates)

columns.name: AffiliateCustom2
columns.comment: Custom field 2. Configurable per deployment. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.dbo.tblaff_Affiliates)

columns.name: AffiliateCustom3
columns.comment: Custom field 3. Configurable per deployment. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.dbo.tblaff_Affiliates)

columns.name: AffiliateCustom4
columns.comment: Custom field 4. Configurable per deployment. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.dbo.tblaff_Affiliates)

columns.name: AffiliateCustom5
columns.comment: Custom field 5. Configurable per deployment. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.dbo.tblaff_Affiliates)

columns.name: PaymentDetailsID
columns.comment: Primary payment method. References dbo.tblaff_PaymentDetails [done]. Links to banking/payment info for commission disbursement. Has NC index. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.dbo.tblaff_Affiliates)

columns.name: IBAffiliate
columns.comment: Introducing Broker flag/parent ID. 0=not an IB, >0=this affiliate is an IB (value may indicate parent IB structure). (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.dbo.tblaff_Affiliates)

columns.name: Reports_Tiers_Summary
columns.comment: Controls whether the affiliate can see tier summary reports in the portal. 1=visible, 0=hidden. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.dbo.tblaff_Affiliates)

columns.name: Reports_Tiers_Details
columns.comment: Controls whether the affiliate can see detailed tier reports in the portal. 1=visible, 0=hidden. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.dbo.tblaff_Affiliates)

columns.name: IBCountries
columns.comment: Comma-separated or JSON list of country IDs where this IB affiliate can operate. NULL means no geographic restriction. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.dbo.tblaff_Affiliates)

columns.name: ManagerID_Demo
columns.comment: Demo account manager ID assigned to this affiliate. Default 36. Used for demo/sandbox environment tracking. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.dbo.tblaff_Affiliates)

columns.name: ManagerID_Real
columns.comment: Real/production account manager ID assigned to this affiliate. Default 45. Determines which manager oversees this affiliate relationship. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.dbo.tblaff_Affiliates)

columns.name: MarketingExpenseID
columns.comment: Marketing expense category. References dbo.tblaff_MarketingExpense [done]. Default 1. Categorizes the affiliate's marketing cost allocation. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.dbo.tblaff_Affiliates)

columns.name: IBProviderID
columns.comment: The provider/partner ID within the IB hierarchy. Default 1. For IB sub-affiliates, identifies their parent IB. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.dbo.tblaff_Affiliates)

columns.name: IBLabelID
columns.comment: Label/brand identifier within the IB structure. Default 0. Supports white-label IB configurations. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.dbo.tblaff_Affiliates)

columns.name: HideExceptIBCRM
columns.comment: Visibility flag. 1=this affiliate is hidden from standard admin views, only visible in IB CRM tools. 0=visible everywhere. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.dbo.tblaff_Affiliates)

columns.name: CanShowCashier
columns.comment: Controls whether the affiliate can access cashier/payment features in the portal. 1=cashier visible, 0=hidden. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.dbo.tblaff_Affiliates)

columns.name: CommunicationLangID
columns.comment: Preferred communication language for emails and notifications. Default 0. References a language lookup. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.dbo.tblaff_Affiliates)

columns.name: CountImpressions
columns.comment: Controls whether banner impressions are tracked for this affiliate. 1=track impressions, 0=clicks only. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.dbo.tblaff_Affiliates)

columns.name: CountClicks
columns.comment: Controls whether clicks are tracked for this affiliate. 1=track clicks (default), 0=no click tracking. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.dbo.tblaff_Affiliates)

columns.name: PrefferedCurrencyID
columns.comment: Affiliate's preferred payment currency. References Dictionary.Currency (1=USD, 2=EUR, 3=GBP, 4=CAD, 5=AUD, 38=RMB). (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.dbo.tblaff_Affiliates)

columns.name: PaymentDetails2ID
columns.comment: Secondary payment method. References dbo.tblaff_PaymentDetails [done]. NULL if only one payment method configured. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.dbo.tblaff_Affiliates)

columns.name: PaymentDetails3ID
columns.comment: Tertiary payment method. References dbo.tblaff_PaymentDetails [done]. NULL if fewer than three payment methods configured. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.dbo.tblaff_Affiliates)

columns.name: PaymentDetailsDefault
columns.comment: Indicates which payment method is active for disbursement. 1=primary (PaymentDetailsID), 2=secondary, 12=specific method (most common at 93%). (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.dbo.tblaff_Affiliates)

columns.name: BirthDayDate

columns.name: CountryID
columns.comment: Normalized country reference. FK to dbo.tblaff_Country.CountryID [done]. Default 0. The authoritative country field (replaces legacy Country text field). (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.dbo.tblaff_Affiliates)

columns.name: IdentificationTypeID
columns.comment: Type of government ID submitted. FK to Dictionary.IdentificationType: 1=Passport, 2=ID Card, 3=NI Number, etc. Part of KYC compliance. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.dbo.tblaff_Affiliates)

columns.name: IdentificationNumber
columns.comment: The actual ID document number corresponding to IdentificationTypeID. Stored for KYC verification records. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.dbo.tblaff_Affiliates)

columns.name: NeedsResetPassword
columns.comment: Forces password change on next login. 1=must reset, NULL/0=normal login. Set by admins for security events. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.dbo.tblaff_Affiliates)

columns.name: GCID
columns.comment: Global Customer ID linking this affiliate to the main trading platform's customer system. Has filtered NC index (WHERE GCID IS NOT NULL). Enables cross-platform identity resolution. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.dbo.tblaff_Affiliates)

columns.name: AccountTypeID
columns.comment: Entity type classification: 0=Legacy/unclassified (181), 1=Individual (43,513), 2=Corporate (12). Determines required compliance fields. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.dbo.tblaff_Affiliates)

columns.name: EntityName
columns.comment: Legal entity name for corporate affiliates (AccountTypeID=2). The registered company name for KYP documentation. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.dbo.tblaff_Affiliates)

columns.name: IncorporationNumber
columns.comment: Company registration/incorporation number for corporate affiliates. Required for KYP compliance. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.dbo.tblaff_Affiliates)

columns.name: IncorporationDate
columns.comment: Date the corporate entity was incorporated. Part of KYP due diligence. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.dbo.tblaff_Affiliates)

columns.name: LeiNumber
columns.comment: Legal Entity Identifier (LEI) - a 20-character alphanumeric code required for corporate entities under MiFID II and other financial regulations. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.dbo.tblaff_Affiliates)

columns.name: ContactPersonFullName
columns.comment: Full name of the authorized contact person for corporate affiliates. MASKED with default(). (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.dbo.tblaff_Affiliates)

columns.name: CreationSourceID

columns.name: AzureObjectId

columns.name: Trace

columns.name: PhoneCountryID
columns.comment: International dialing code/country for the affiliate's phone number. Structured replacement for the legacy Telephone field. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.dbo.tblaff_Affiliates)

columns.name: PhoneNumber
columns.comment: Affiliate's phone number (without country code). Paired with PhoneCountryID for the full international number. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.dbo.tblaff_Affiliates)

columns.name: LoginName_LOWER

columns.name: CalculateCommission

columns.name: AffiliatesGroupsName

columns.name: AccountManagerName

columns.name: AccountManagerEmail

columns.name: AccountManagerImagePath

columns.name: ManagerUserID
columns.comment: FK to dbo.tblaff_User.UserID. The admin user responsible for this group. 0 or NULL = no dedicated manager. Used in the Dynamics CRM sync trigger. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.dbo.tblaff_AffiliatesGroups)

columns.name: Type

columns.name: CountryID
columns.comment: Customer country identifier. FK to Dim_Country.

columns.name: Name

columns.name: AffiliateTypeID

columns.name: PaymentMethodID
columns.comment: Primary key (IDENTITY) identifying the payment method. Values: 1=None, 2=PayPal, 3=Wire Transfer, 4=eToro Trading Account, 5=Neteller, 6=Skrill, 7=Webmoney, 8=Credit Card, 9=China Union Pay. See Payment Methods for full definitions. IDENTITY column - NOT FOR REPLICATION. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.Dictionary.PaymentMethods)

columns.name: Name
columns.comment: Human-readable label for the payment method. Used in admin UIs, payment processing screens, and affiliate self-service portals. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, fiktivo.Dictionary.PaymentMethods)

columns.name: PostTransferActionID
columns.comment: Auto-incrementing primary key (NONCLUSTERED). Unique identifier for each post-transfer action. Current values in the ~2.59M range. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, MoneyTransfer.Billing.PostTransferActions)

columns.name: TransferID
columns.comment: Foreign key to Billing.Transfers.TransferID (implicit, no constraint). Links this action to its parent transfer. Set by CreatePostTransfer. Every action must be associated with an existing transfer. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, MoneyTransfer.Billing.PostTransferActions)

columns.name: ReferenceID
columns.comment: Business reference GUID for this action. Indexed (IX_Billing_PostTransferActions) for lookup performance. Used as the primary lookup key by GetPostTransfer, UpdatePostTransferPayload, and UpdatePostTransferStatus. May correspond to the parent transfer's ReferenceID or be action-specific. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, MoneyTransfer.Billing.PostTransferActions)

columns.name: Payload
columns.comment: Masked (Dynamic Data Masking: default()) JSON or structured data containing the action's operational details. Contains PII. Set by CreatePostTransfer and can be updated by UpdatePostTransferPayload. The content depends on the action type and may include funding instrument details, provider responses, or processing metadata. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, MoneyTransfer.Billing.PostTransferActions)

columns.name: FundingTypeID
columns.comment: Type of funding instrument associated with this action. No lookup table in this database. Sample data consistently shows value 33 (matching the DestinationFundingTypeID pattern in Billing.Transfers), suggesting most post-transfer actions relate to destination-side processing. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, MoneyTransfer.Billing.PostTransferActions)

columns.name: PostTransferStatusID
columns.comment: Lifecycle status of this post-transfer action. Implicit reference to Dictionary.PostTransferStatus (currently empty). Observed values: 1 (initial/in-progress), 2 (completed). Set by CreatePostTransfer, updated by UpdatePostTransferStatus. See Post Transfer Status. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, MoneyTransfer.Billing.PostTransferActions)

columns.name: CreateDate
columns.comment: UTC timestamp of action creation. Set automatically via DEFAULT constraint. No modification timestamp exists - status changes are tracked only by value, not by when they occurred. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, MoneyTransfer.Billing.PostTransferActions)

columns.name: PostTransferActionTypeID
columns.comment: Type classification for the post-transfer action. Defaults to 1 via constraint DF_PostTransferActions_PostTransferActionTypeID. All observed data shows value 1, suggesting only one action type is currently in use. No lookup table exists in this database. Set by CreatePostTransfer. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, MoneyTransfer.Billing.PostTransferActions)

columns.name: TransferID
columns.comment: Auto-incrementing unique identifier for each transfer. NONCLUSTERED PK. Used as a secondary lookup key and in range-based monitoring queries (GetLastTransfersStatusesInPercentage scans by TransferID ranges). Current values in the ~4.88M range. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, MoneyTransfer.Billing.Transfers)

columns.name: ReferenceID
columns.comment: Application-generated GUID serving as the primary business key for each transfer. UNIQUE CLUSTERED index makes it the physical sort order. All UPDATE operations (SaveRoutingInfo, SaveTransferOrigin, UpdateTransferStatus, etc.) locate records by ReferenceID via WHERE clause. More reliable than TransferID for cross-service correlation. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, MoneyTransfer.Billing.Transfers)

columns.name: CID
columns.comment: Customer identifier - the user who initiated or owns the transfer. Used for customer-scoped queries: GetTransfersByCID, GetDepotIdOfLastSuccessfulTransferByCid, GetLastSuccessTransferDataByCid. Indexed for performance (IX_Billing_Transfers_CID). References an external customer system. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, MoneyTransfer.Billing.Transfers)

columns.name: CurrencyID
columns.comment: Currency of the transfer amount. No Dictionary table exists in this database; values are managed externally. Sample data shows 2 (likely EUR) and 3 (likely GBP) as common values. Part of composite index IX_Billing_Transfers_CurrencyID_TransferStatusID_TransferID. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, MoneyTransfer.Billing.Transfers)

columns.name: OriginFundingTypeID
columns.comment: Type classification for the source/origin funding instrument. No lookup table in this database; values managed by the MoneyBus/MoneyBusAdapter application layer. Sample data shows 38 as the dominant value. Paired with DestinationFundingTypeID to define the transfer direction (e.g., bank-to-trading, trading-to-bank). (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, MoneyTransfer.Billing.Transfers)

columns.name: DestinationFundingTypeID
columns.comment: Type classification for the destination funding instrument. No lookup table in this database. Sample data shows 33 as the dominant value. Together with OriginFundingTypeID defines the transfer flow direction. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, MoneyTransfer.Billing.Transfers)

columns.name: Amount
columns.comment: Transfer amount in the currency specified by CurrencyID. Set at creation time and not modified afterward. Observed range in sample: 50 to 10,000. Stored as SQL Server money type (4 decimal places). (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, MoneyTransfer.Billing.Transfers)

columns.name: OriginFundingData
columns.comment: Masked (Dynamic Data Masking: default()) JSON or structured data containing the origin funding instrument details (bank account number, card details, etc.). Contains PII - masked for non-privileged users. Set by Billing.SaveTransferOrigin. NULL until the origin funding data is captured. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, MoneyTransfer.Billing.Transfers)

columns.name: DestinationFundingData
columns.comment: Masked (Dynamic Data Masking: default()) JSON or structured data containing the destination funding instrument details. Contains PII. Set by Billing.SaveTransferDestination. NULL until destination data is captured. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, MoneyTransfer.Billing.Transfers)

columns.name: CreateDate
columns.comment: UTC timestamp of transfer creation. Set automatically on INSERT via DEFAULT constraint. Never modified after creation. Used in monitoring queries to scope transfers by time window. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, MoneyTransfer.Billing.Transfers)

columns.name: ModificationDate
columns.comment: UTC timestamp of the most recent modification. Initialized to GETUTCDATE() on INSERT, then auto-updated by trigger TR_Transfers_ModificationDate on every UPDATE operation. The gap between CreateDate and ModificationDate indicates processing duration. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, MoneyTransfer.Billing.Transfers)

columns.name: TransferStatusID
columns.comment: Current lifecycle state of the transfer. Implicit FK to Dictionary.TransferStatus: 0=New, 1=Init, 2=Pending, 4=Technical, 7=Cancel, 8=Fail, 9=Sent, 10=Received. See Transfer Status for full business definitions. Set to 0 on INSERT by CreateTransfer; updated by UpdateTransferStatus. Status 10 is a hard terminal state. Part of composite index with CurrencyID and TransferID. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, MoneyTransfer.Billing.Transfers)

columns.name: ExReferenceID
columns.comment: External reference ID - a provider-facing identifier for the transfer. Prefix pattern observed: "TZ" and "TK" followed by a GUID fragment (lowercase, no hyphens). Set at creation time and can be updated by SaveExtRefId. Covered by index IX_Transfer_ExReferenceID_Cover for lookups via GetTransferByExReference. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, MoneyTransfer.Billing.Transfers)

columns.name: Trace
columns.comment: Computed column (not persisted) generating a JSON diagnostic string containing HostName, AppName, SUserName, SPID, DBName, and ObjectName at query time. Formula: CONCAT('{"HostName": "',host_name(),'","AppName": "',app_name(),...}'). Used for debugging to identify which connection/process last read the row. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, MoneyTransfer.Billing.Transfers)

columns.name: InitFundingId
columns.comment: Initial funding instrument identifier assigned early in the transfer pipeline, before origin/destination routing is finalized. Set by SaveTransferInitFundingId. Often NULL - populated only when the initial funding instrument differs from the final origin/destination. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, MoneyTransfer.Billing.Transfers)

columns.name: OriginFundingId
columns.comment: Provider-assigned numeric identifier for the origin funding instrument (bank account, card, wallet). Set by SaveTransferOriginFundingId. NULL in most recent sample data, suggesting it may be populated only for certain transfer types or providers. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, MoneyTransfer.Billing.Transfers)

columns.name: DestinationFundingId
columns.comment: Provider-assigned numeric identifier for the destination funding instrument. Set by SaveTransferDestinationFundingId. More frequently populated than OriginFundingId in sample data. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, MoneyTransfer.Billing.Transfers)

columns.name: DepotId
columns.comment: Depot/data center identifier determining which processing infrastructure handles this transfer. Set by SaveRoutingInfo. Common values: 104 and 166. Default fallback value is 104 (used by GetDepotIdOfLastSuccessfulTransferByCid when DepotId is NULL). Determines routing for regional processing. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, MoneyTransfer.Billing.Transfers)

columns.name: CountryId
columns.comment: Country identifier for the customer or transfer jurisdiction. Set by SaveRoutingInfo alongside DepotId. Observed values: 74, 112, 143, 191, 218. References an external country lookup. Used for regional routing and compliance. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, MoneyTransfer.Billing.Transfers)

columns.name: ExtTransactionId
columns.comment: External transaction identifier from the payment provider. Set by SaveExtTransactionId. Can be GUID-format (with hyphens removed) or shorter hex strings, depending on the provider. NULL until the provider assigns a transaction reference. Returned by GetTransferByReferenceID. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, MoneyTransfer.Billing.Transfers)

columns.name: ID

columns.name: CID

columns.name: InstrumentID

columns.name: RecurringDepositID

columns.name: Amount
columns.comment: Same as parent table RecurringInvestment.Plans.Amount. Investment amount per cycle in the plan's CurrencyID at the time this row version was current. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, RecurringInvestment.History.RecurringInvestmentPlans)

columns.name: CurrencyID
columns.comment: Same as parent table RecurringInvestment.Plans.CurrencyID. Currency of the plan's Amount. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, RecurringInvestment.History.RecurringInvestmentPlans)

columns.name: PlanStatusID

columns.name: DepositPlanStatusID
columns.comment: Same as parent table RecurringInvestment.Plans.DepositPlanStatusID. DEPRECATED. Status of the linked recurring deposit plan. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, RecurringInvestment.History.RecurringInvestmentPlans)

columns.name: StatusReasonID
columns.comment: Same as parent table RecurringInvestment.Plans.StatusReasonID. Reason for the plan status at this point in time. Maps to Dictionary.PlanEventCode. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, RecurringInvestment.History.RecurringInvestmentPlans)

columns.name: CreationDate
columns.comment: Same as parent table RecurringInvestment.Plans.CreationDate. When the plan was originally created. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, RecurringInvestment.History.RecurringInvestmentPlans)

columns.name: EndDate
columns.comment: Same as parent table RecurringInvestment.Plans.EndDate. When the plan was cancelled. NULL while active. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, RecurringInvestment.History.RecurringInvestmentPlans)

columns.name: DepositStartDate
columns.comment: Same as parent table RecurringInvestment.Plans.DepositStartDate. When the plan's first deposit occurred or was scheduled. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, RecurringInvestment.History.RecurringInvestmentPlans)

columns.name: FrequencyID
